title: Planet Fitness CEO on ‘Unparalleled' Reach, Growth Plans
description: Colleen Keating, CEO of Planet Fitness, discusses the company’s business health, earnings, and outlook with Romaine Bostick and Kristine Aquino on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
content: Colleen Keating, CEO of Planet Fitness, discusses the company’s business health, earnings, and outlook with Romaine Bostick and Kristine Aquino on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
